title: ophrys × cesinensis
intro: Ophrys × cesinensis, also known as the bee orchid, is a hybrid plant species obtained from crossing Ophrys apifera with Ophrys sphegodes. Traditionally, the bee orchid has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × cesinensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory tract irritations, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of the bee orchid are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
